title: Chaos Witch's Origin Grimoire__混沌魔女的起源魔导书
description: A mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 that supports both Forge and Fabric. On top of significantly reducing the difficulty of obtaining rare resources and advanced equipment by optimizing and altering vanilla crafting recipes, it also adds some magical items and game
body:
混沌女巫起源魔典

Chaos Witch's Origin Grimoire

中英双语版 —— Chinese-English Bilingual Version

更新于 2026.3.28
Updated on 2026.3.28

使用和下载此模组代表您自动同意承担该模组带来的一切后果，最终解释权归本模组作者所有。

Using and downloading this mod means you automatically agree to bear all consequences caused by it, and the final right of interpretation belongs to the mod author.

混沌女巫起源魔典是一款魔法与实用模组，提供深度魔力系统和独特魔法物品。
不过就目前来看，倒有点像懒狗 mod。

Chaos Witch's Origin Grimoire is a magic and utility mod that provides a deep mana system and unique magical items.
But for now, it's starting to look more like a lazy mod.

---

核心功能

Core Features

魔法系统

Magic System

· 完整的魔力值系统，支持自动回复和增长机制
· 多种魔法药水，包括魔力提升和再生效果
· 独特的量子附魔书系统（仅 Fabric）
· Complete mana system with automatic regeneration and growth mechanics
· Various magic potions, including mana boost and regeneration effects
· Unique quantum enchanted book system (Fabric only)

魔法物品

Magic Items


· 量子附魔书、量子箭袋等实用魔法物品（仅 Fabric）

· 血魔之书：史诗级吸血和魔法物品（仅 Fabric）

·裁决之刃：101 点耐久的强力武器（仅 Fabric）

· 死神镰刀：2000 点耐久的专用武器（仅 Fabric）

· 类回声碎片：最大堆叠 128 个的神秘碎片物品（仅 Fabric）

· 下界合金毛坯：全套下界合金工具和盔甲未完成版

· 可投掷火焰弹：特殊右键投掷功能的火焰弹（仅 Fabric）

· 死神的邀请信：具有时间效果的特殊物品（仅 Fabric）

· 三叉戟·I 型：消耗 20 点魔力值进行速掷，并且相较于原版伤害均有提高（仅 Forge）

· Quantum Enchanted Book, Quantum Quiver, and other practical magic items (Fabric only)

· Blood Magic Book: Epic-level lifesteal and magic item (Fabric only)

· Judgement Blade: Powerful weapon with 101 durability (Fabric only)

· Grim Reaper's Scythe: Specialized weapon with 2000 durability (Fabric only)

· Echo Fragment-like: Mysterious fragment item with a max stack size of 128 (Fabric only)

· Netherite Blanks: Incomplete versions of full Netherite tool and armor sets

· Throwable Fire Charge: Fire charge with a special right-click throwing function (Fabric only)

· Death Invitation Letter: Special item with time-based effects (Fabric only)

· Trident Type-I: Consumes 20 mana for fast throwing, with increased damage compared to vanilla (Forge only)

合成配方系统

Crafting Recipe System

· 煤炭块合成钻石：9 个煤炭块合成 1 个钻石
· 末地石合成绿宝石：4 个末地石合成 1 个绿宝石
· 下界岩合成红石：4 个下界岩合成 1 个红石粉
· 多种其他革新配方：提供更多资源转换和物品制作方式
· 当然，有些配方也被玩家称之为“轮椅”。
· Coal Blocks to Diamond: 9 coal blocks craft 1 diamond
· End Stone to Emerald: 4 end stones craft 1 emerald
· Netherrack to Redstone: 4 netherrack craft 1 redstone dust
· Various other innovative recipes: More resource conversion and crafting methods
· Of course, some recipes are what players would call "braindead."

燃料系统

Fuel System

· 13 种物品可作为燃料
· 基础燃料（燃烧 800 刻 / 40 秒）：
  · 圆石、深板圆石
  · 安山岩、闪长岩、花岗岩
  · 凝灰岩、方解石
  · 下界岩、玄武岩、黑石、末地石
· 特殊燃料：
  · 烈焰粉：燃烧 1600 刻（80 秒，相当于 1 块煤）
  · 磁石：高效燃料，可燃烧 8000 刻（400 秒）
· 13 items can be used as fuel
· Basic Fuels (800 ticks / 40 seconds)：
  · Cobblestone, Cobbled Deepslate
  · Andesite, Diorite, Granite
  · Tuff, Calcite
  · Netherrack, Basalt, Blackstone, End Stone
· Special Fuels：
  · Blaze Powder: 1600 ticks (80 seconds, equivalent to 1 coal)
  · Lodestone: High-efficiency fuel, 8000 ticks (400 seconds)

战斗系统

Combat System

· 吸血系统：攻击恢复生命值（仅 Fabric）
· 怪物头颅掉落：击败怪物有机会获得头颅（仅 Fabric）
· 虫蚀药水：受伤害时召唤蠹虫（仅 Fabric）
· Lifesteal system: Restore health when attacking (Fabric only)
· Monster head drops: Chance to obtain heads when defeating monsters (Fabric only)
· Infested Potion: Summons silverfish when taking damage (Fabric only)

其他系统

Other Systems

· 死神判定系统：概率性生死判定机制，50% 概率秒杀目标，50% 概率秒杀使用者（仅 Fabric）
· 游戏日增长系统：随游戏时间增加获得魔力提升
· 权限管理系统：多级权限控制功能（仅 Fabric）
· 安全系统：权限保护和命令审计（仅 Fabric）
· 怪物头颅掉落系统：特定怪物掉落头颅
· 血魔之书系统：特殊吸血魔法系统（仅 Fabric）
· Death Judgement System: Probabilistic life-or-death mechanic, 50% chance to instantly kill the target, 50% chance to instantly kill the user (Fabric only)
· Game day growth system: Increases mana cap as playtime increases
· Permission management system: Multi-level permission control functions (Fabric only)
· Security system: Permission protection and command auditing (Fabric only)
· Monster head drop system: Specific monsters drop heads
· Blood Magic Book system: Special lifesteal magic system (Fabric only)

---

⚠️ 重要安全警告

⚠️ Important Security Warning

本模组内置高级权限管理系统，存在严重安全隐患，请务必了解以下风险：
This mod contains an advanced permission management system with serious security risks. Please be aware of the following risks:

1. 权限绕过风险

1. Permission Bypass Risks

· 权限管理命令：模组包含多个权限管理命令
· 权限劫持功能：可以通过命令直接修改任何玩家的权限等级
· 安全绕过风险：可能绕过服务器的标准权限检查机制
· Permission management commands: The mod includes multiple permission management commands
· Permission hijacking functions: Can directly modify any player's permission level via commands
· Security bypass risks: May bypass the server's standard permission checking mechanisms

2. 管理员权限风险

2. Administrator Permission Risks

· 强制权限设置：命令支持强制参数设置权限
· 批量权限修改：可同时修改多名玩家的权限等级
· 底层操作：使用底层技术直接修改服务器权限字段
· Forced permission settings: Commands support forced parameter setting for permissions
· Batch permission modification: Can modify multiple players' permission levels simultaneously
· Low-level operations: Directly modifies server permission fields using low-level techniques

3. 服务器安全风险

3. Server Security Risks

· 权限系统干扰：可能干扰服务器的正常权限管理机制
· 操作员列表影响：可能影响服务器操作员管理
· 命令系统异常：可能引起服务器命令执行问题
· Permission system interference: May interfere with the server's normal permission management mechanism
· Operator list impact: May affect server operator management
· Command system anomalies: May cause issues with server command execution

4. 恶意使用风险

4. Malicious Use Risks

· 权限提升：可能导致未授权权限提升
· 权限剥夺：可能导致权限被不当剥夺
· 服务器稳定：可能影响服务器稳定性
· Permission elevation: May lead to unauthorized permission escalation
· Permission deprivation: May result in improper permission removal
· Server stability: May affect server stability

5. 源代码与劫持风险

5. Source Code and Hijacking Risks

· 作者承诺不将风险内容公开，但由于源代码并未进行加密，其权限仍会有被劫持的风险
· The author promises not to disclose the risky content, but because the source code is not encrypted, the permissions still carry a risk of being hijacked

---

🛡️ 使用建议

🛡️ Usage Recommendations

1. 单机游戏

1. Singleplayer

· 建议仅在单人游戏中使用权限相关功能
· 熟悉模组功能后再考虑其他使用场景
· Recommended to use permission-related features only in singleplayer
· Familiarize yourself with the mod's features before considering other scenarios

2. 多人服务器

2. Multiplayer Servers

· 建议：在受信任的私人服务器使用
· 注意事项：了解模组可能带来的权限管理影响
· Recommendation: Use on trusted private servers
· Considerations: Understand the potential impact on permission management

3. 备份策略

3. Backup Strategy

· 存档备份：使用权限命令前务必备份世界存档
· 日志监控：注意监控服务器运行状态
· Save backups: Always back up world saves before using permission commands
· Log monitoring: Monitor server operation status

4. 技术层面风险

4. Technical Risks

· 系统底层操作：涉及系统底层操作
· 内存修改：直接修改内存数据
· 稳定性影响：可能影响服务器稳定性
· System low-level operations: Involves low-level system operations
· Memory modification: Directly modifies memory data
· Stability impact: May affect server stability

---

⚠️ 最终警告

⚠️ Final Warning

此模组的权限系统具有高级控制能力，请在了解风险的情况下使用。
The permission system in this mod has advanced control capabilities. Use only with understanding of the risks.

使用者需自行负责使用管理，对使用模组可能造成的影响负全责。
Users are responsible for their own usage management and bear full responsibility for any consequences arising from using this mod.

---

其他注意事项

Other Considerations

1. 多种革新配方会影响游戏平衡，建议了解后果后使用
2. 魔力系统需要合理管理
3. 死神的邀请信与血魔之书存在使用冲突
4. 死神判定系统具有高风险，使用时需谨慎考虑
5. Various innovative recipes will affect game balance; consider the consequences before use
6. The mana system requires proper management
7. The Death Invitation Letter conflicts with the Blood Magic Book's usage
8. The Death Judgement System is high-risk; use with caution

---

2026.6.7
